name: Kinross Gold Corporation
description: Kinross Gold Corporation is a senior gold mining company headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with producing mines in the United States, Brazil, and Mauritania. Key assets include Fort Knox, Round Mountain, and Bald Mountain in the USA, Paracatu in Brazil, and Tasiast in Mauritania, with the Great Bear project in Ontario as a major development-stage asset. Kinross is a fully-integrated senior producer with active exploration across its portfolio.
